title: Lightiodendron licanioides

taxonomy: Lightiodendron licanioides is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. The classification of Lightiodendron licanioides is further divided into the class Magnoliopsida, order Celastrales, and family Celastraceae. The specific classification of Lightiodendron licanioides is based on its morphological and molecular features.
